penalties: Target is 39×17px, below the WCAG 2.5.8 minimum (24×24 for AA). Users with motor impairments have a higher miss rate on small targets. Screen-reader users aren't affected, but touch/pointer users are.
suggestedFixes: Increase min-width and min-height to 24px, or enlarge the clickable area via padding. An invisible padded hit region can enlarge touch target without changing visual design.

diagnostics.message: No skip-to-content link found. Keyboard and screen-reader users must Tab through all navigation elements to reach the main content. A skip link is the single most impactful fix for navigation cost. Concrete savings: a skip link would bypass 2 controls (25% of page interactive targets).
Structural overview: 6 headings · landmarks: main, banner, contentinfo, navigation · skip link: no · 23 total targets

5 text elements lose contrast under simulated color-vision deficiency (tritanopia: 5). Examples (tritanopia): a "Home" — 9.4:1 normal → 2.44:1 tritanopia (needs 4.5:1); a "Products" — 9.4:1 normal → 2.44:1 tritanopia (needs 4.5:1); a "Learn more about this product" — 9.4:1 normal → 2.44:1 tritanopia (needs 4.5:1). Approximately 8% of male and 0.5% of female users have a CVD; choose color combinations whose contrast survives the deuteranopia/protanopia/tritanopia transforms or rely on luminance + non-color cues.
